tools.name: list_rules
tools.description: Discover applicable test writing rules by metadata filters. Returns a compact table with id, title, enforce level, and legacy code for each matching rule. Use to find which rules apply to a specific test type, category, or scope before retrieving full content with get_rules.

test_type.description: Filter by test type. Excludes unit-only rules when set to 'integration' or 'migration'.

test_category.description: Only rules applicable to this test category.

scope.description: Only rules with this scope tag.

enforce.description: Only rules at this enforcement level.

tools.name: get_rules
tools.description: Get full content of one or more rules by ID. Accepts current rule IDs (e.g. DESIGN-001, CONV-003) or legacy codes (e.g. E001, W004). Returns the complete markdown body including detection patterns, examples, and fix guidance for each requested rule.

ids.description: Comma-separated rule IDs or legacy codes. Examples: 'DESIGN-001,CONV-003', 'E001,W004,I007'.

tools.name: resolve_legacy
tools.description: Map legacy E/W/I error codes to current rule IDs. Returns a mapping table showing legacy code, current ID, title, and group for each code. Use when working with old-format error codes that need translation to the current rule system.
